ai.page.caption: AI workspace
ai.page.title: AI input and output state
ai.page.description: This round wires up the material list, single-video activation, mode shell, and baseline output settings. It still does not start real AI inference.
ai.page.materials.title: Material list
ai.page.materials.description: Only video materials are accepted. Supported formats: {formats}. Multiple videos can be imported, but only one current video can be processed at a time.
ai.page.materials.placeholder: Import one or more videos, then lock the current processing target from the material list.
ai.page.workspace.title: AI workspace
ai.page.workspace.description: Mode switching only changes the AI parameter shell and later execution plan. It does not pollute imported materials or the current processing target.
ai.page.workspace.modeHint: AI interpolation and AI enhancement share the same material library and current video selection. Each mode will attach its own workflow in later rounds.
ai.interpolation.modeDescription: The launch route stays frozen to RIFE. Later rounds will attach multipliers, device strategy, cancellation, and progress feedback.
ai.interpolation.trackHint: AI interpolation mode is active. Only one video can be used as the interpolation input per run, and later multiplier, device, and execution state will stay inside this mode.
ai.interpolation.trackEmpty: Select a video from the material list to lock it as the current interpolation input.
ai.interpolation.runtimeNote: R5 only models input and output state. It does not connect the RIFE runtime or inference execution yet.
ai.enhancement.modeDescription: The launch route stays frozen to Real-ESRGAN with the scale range fixed from 2x to 16x. The model and execution chain will be added incrementally later.
ai.enhancement.trackHint: AI enhancement mode is active. Only one video can be used as the enhancement input per run, and later model tiers, scale planning, and high-load warnings will stay inside this mode.
ai.enhancement.trackEmpty: Select a video from the material list to lock it as the current enhancement input.
ai.enhancement.runtimeNote: R5 only models input and output state. It does not connect the Real-ESRGAN runtime, scale execution chain, or high-load warnings yet.
ai.page.output.title: Output settings
ai.page.output.description: Output settings now hold the launch baseline: only MP4 and MKV are kept, the directory follows the current source by default, and the file name is generated by mode when left empty.
ai.page.output.format.title: Output format
ai.page.output.format.hint: The launch container scope is frozen to MP4 and MKV. Later runtime work will reuse this output-format state directly.
ai.page.output.directory.title: Output directory
ai.page.output.directory.hint.default: When no folder is chosen manually, output follows the current source directory.
ai.page.output.directory.hint.empty: Select the current processing target to populate the default output directory.
ai.page.output.directory.placeholder.noI: The default directory will appear after a target is selected
ai.page.output.fileName.title: Output file name
ai.page.output.fileName.hint: When left empty, a suggested file name is generated from the current video and selected mode. Later runtime work will consume this file-name state directly.
ai.page.output.summary: Current parameter state: mode {mode}, input {input}, output {format}, file name {fileName}, and the original audio track follows the source by default.
ai.status.ready: Import one or more videos, then lock the current processing target from the material list.
ai.status.importUnavailable: The current runtime does not have a file picker wired in, so AI video materials cannot be imported right now.
ai.status.importFailed: Video import failed. Please try again.
ai.status.importSummary: {addedCount} videos imported, {duplicateCount} duplicates skipped, and {rejectedCount} non-video or unavailable entries rejected.
ai.status.importDuplicateAndRejected: No new video materials were added. {duplicateCount} duplicates were skipped and {rejectedCount} non-video or unavailable entries were rejected.
ai.status.duplicateOnly: All selected videos are already in the material list, so nothing was imported again.
ai.status.rejectedOnly: No importable video files were found. {rejectedCount} non-video or unavailable entries were rejected.
ai.status.noProcessable: No importable video files were found.
ai.status.libraryCleared: The material list is empty. There is no processable video right now.
ai.status.modeChanged: Switched to {mode}. The current processing target was kept.
ai.status.outputDirectorySelectionFailed: Choosing the output directory failed. Please try again.
ai.status.outputDirectoryCleared: Output now follows the current source directory again.
ai.status.startDeferred: R5 only completes input and output state. It does not start real AI inference; the next round will continue with runtime and execution-chain work.
